## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential SEO partnership between Arcade and fwd.digital](https://fathom.video/share/8HfZLy6-3DNoxUhFzJ4Fw3HFUE1y2tbB?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [fwd.digital offers AI-powered SEO content creation with human expert oversight](https://fathom.video/share/8HfZLy6-3DNoxUhFzJ4Fw3HFUE1y2tbB?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [Arcade sees SEO as a key growth channel; currently converting \~10% visitors to signups, 5% to paid](https://fathom.video/share/8HfZLy6-3DNoxUhFzJ4Fw3HFUE1y2tbB?tab=summary&timestamp=1041.0)
  - [fwd.digital's services start at $50k/month for editorial, $25k/month for programmatic SEO](https://fathom.video/share/8HfZLy6-3DNoxUhFzJ4Fw3HFUE1y2tbB?tab=summary&timestamp=1696.0)
  - [Earliest start date would be March 17th due to fwd.digital's current workload](https://fathom.video/share/8HfZLy6-3DNoxUhFzJ4Fw3HFUE1y2tbB?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)

## Topics

### Arcade's Current Marketing Situation

  - [David recently joined as interim head of growth (\~1 month ago)](https://fathom.video/share/8HfZLy6-3DNoxUhFzJ4Fw3HFUE1y2tbB?tab=summary&timestamp=1252.0)
  - [Limited marketing resources currently; hiring in progress](https://fathom.video/share/8HfZLy6-3DNoxUhFzJ4Fw3HFUE1y2tbB?tab=summary&timestamp=1507.0)
  - [Using Webflow CMS, considering improved analytics (previously GetKoala)](https://fathom.video/share/8HfZLy6-3DNoxUhFzJ4Fw3HFUE1y2tbB?tab=summary&timestamp=1512.0)
  - [Cost per acquisition: $210 for pro/growth plans, $11k for enterprise](https://fathom.video/share/8HfZLy6-3DNoxUhFzJ4Fw3HFUE1y2tbB?tab=summary&timestamp=1041.0)

### fwd.digital's Approach and Capabilities

  - [AI-powered content creation workflow with human expert oversight](https://fathom.video/share/8HfZLy6-3DNoxUhFzJ4Fw3HFUE1y2tbB?tab=summary&timestamp=532.0)
  - [Combines editorial and programmatic SEO strategies](https://fathom.video/share/8HfZLy6-3DNoxUhFzJ4Fw3HFUE1y2tbB?tab=summary&timestamp=1291.0)
  - [Typical timeline: Initial signals by week 4-5, inflection around week 17](https://fathom.video/share/8HfZLy6-3DNoxUhFzJ4Fw3HFUE1y2tbB?tab=summary&timestamp=752.0)
  - [Services include persona development, content strategy, and production](https://fathom.video/share/8HfZLy6-3DNoxUhFzJ4Fw3HFUE1y2tbB?tab=summary&timestamp=1369.0)
  - [Programmatic SEO potential for vendor comparisons and category pages](https://fathom.video/share/8HfZLy6-3DNoxUhFzJ4Fw3HFUE1y2tbB?tab=summary&timestamp=1473.0)

### SEO Strategy and Expectations

  - [David believes SEO is crucial for Arcade's growth](https://fathom.video/share/8HfZLy6-3DNoxUhFzJ4Fw3HFUE1y2tbB?tab=summary&timestamp=666.0)
  - [Marcel agrees, emphasizing balance of editorial and programmatic approaches](https://fathom.video/share/8HfZLy6-3DNoxUhFzJ4Fw3HFUE1y2tbB?tab=summary&timestamp=752.0)
  - [Expectations: 4 phases - production, indexing, impressions/rankings, traffic/conversions](https://fathom.video/share/8HfZLy6-3DNoxUhFzJ4Fw3HFUE1y2tbB?tab=summary&timestamp=833.0)
  - [Importance of conversion strategy alongside traffic growth](https://fathom.video/share/8HfZLy6-3DNoxUhFzJ4Fw3HFUE1y2tbB?tab=summary&timestamp=1041.0)

### Engagement and Resources Required

  - [Kickoff and first 12 weeks require more client involvement (2-3 hours/month minimum)](https://fathom.video/share/8HfZLy6-3DNoxUhFzJ4Fw3HFUE1y2tbB?tab=summary&timestamp=1608.0)
  - [After initial period, ongoing weekly check-ins and strategic alignment](https://fathom.video/share/8HfZLy6-3DNoxUhFzJ4Fw3HFUE1y2tbB?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [fwd.digital handles most of the heavy lifting, including image selection and content creation](https://fathom.video/share/8HfZLy6-3DNoxUhFzJ4Fw3HFUE1y2tbB?tab=summary&timestamp=1598.0)

### Pricing and Next Steps

  - [Editorial: $50k/month minimum (10-20 cents per word, 10-20 pieces/month)](https://fathom.video/share/8HfZLy6-3DNoxUhFzJ4Fw3HFUE1y2tbB?tab=summary&timestamp=1696.0)
  - [Programmatic SEO: $25k/month (\~1200 pages/year, can vary based on complexity)](https://fathom.video/share/8HfZLy6-3DNoxUhFzJ4Fw3HFUE1y2tbB?tab=summary&timestamp=1739.0)
  - [Marcel to send detailed proposal and sample work](https://fathom.video/share/8HfZLy6-3DNoxUhFzJ4Fw3HFUE1y2tbB?tab=summary&timestamp=1779.0)
  - [90-day pilot period available](https://fathom.video/share/8HfZLy6-3DNoxUhFzJ4Fw3HFUE1y2tbB?tab=summary&timestamp=1629.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to send proposal, pricing details, and sample work to David](https://fathom.video/share/8HfZLy6-3DNoxUhFzJ4Fw3HFUE1y2tbB?tab=summary&timestamp=1647.0)
  - [David to review proposal and consider engagement timeline (earliest start March 17th)](https://fathom.video/share/8HfZLy6-3DNoxUhFzJ4Fw3HFUE1y2tbB?tab=summary&timestamp=1665.0)
  - [Potential follow-up meeting to discuss proposal and next steps](https://fathom.video/share/8HfZLy6-3DNoxUhFzJ4Fw3HFUE1y2tbB?tab=summary&timestamp=1665.0)
  - [David to assess internal resource allocation and budget for potential partnership](https://fathom.video/share/8HfZLy6-3DNoxUhFzJ4Fw3HFUE1y2tbB?tab=summary&timestamp=1636.0)
